allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); ['PenToolIcon','PaintbrushIcon','LineChartIcon','LayoutGridIcon','LayoutDashboardIcon','GitBranchIcon','GaugeIcon','CpuIcon','BellIcon','VideoIcon','ListIcon','TagIcon','EyeIcon','ScaleIcon','FileTextIcon','BuildingIcon','ShoppingBagIcon','Share2Icon','MailIcon','TargetIcon','BarChartIcon','StoreIcon','PlayCircleIcon','PackageIcon','MegaphoneIcon','DatabaseIcon','SmartphoneIcon','PaletteIcon','TruckIcon','CreditCardIcon','GlobeIcon','BrainIcon','CompassIcon','CalendarIcon','HandshakeIcon'].forEach\(n => console.log\(n, typeof l[n]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); ['ShirtIcon','TreesIcon','SmartphoneIcon','SparklesIcon','CodeIcon','HeartIcon'].forEach\(n => console.log\(n, typeof l[n]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); ['LayersIcon','ArrowUpRightIcon','ArrowLeftIcon'].forEach\(n => console.log\(n, typeof l[n]\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); ['ClockIcon','BookmarkIcon','TwitterIcon','LinkedinIcon','FacebookIcon','ShareIcon'].forEach\(n => console.log\(n, typeof l[n]\)\)")

PowerShell($utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding\($false\); $files = @\('app\\blog\\[slug]\\page.tsx','app\\work\\[slug]\\page.tsx'\); foreach \($file in $files\) { $path = \(Get-Item -LiteralPath $file\).FullName; $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\($path, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); $before = \([regex]::Matches\($content, '—'\)\).Count; $content = $content -replace ' — ', ', '; $content = $content -replace '—', ', '; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\($path, $content, $utf8NoBom\); Write-Output "$file : $before" })
